vocab.meaning: cảm giác phấn khích, hào hứng tột độ
vocab.example: I remember a profound sense of exhilaration whenever my parents drove us through the winding mountain passes.

vocab.meaning: không gian chật hẹp, tù túng
vocab.example: To be honest, spending hours in the confined space of a car often made me quite restless as a hyperactive child.

vocab.meaning: nhìn chăm chú một cách vô định
vocab.example: I used to spend the entire journey staring aimlessly out the window, watching the city lights blur together.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại nỗi nhớ/kỷ niệm xưa
vocab.example: The smell of old leather seats still manages to evoke nostalgia for the road trips we took every summer.

vocab.meaning: khoảng thời gian gắn kết không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: Long car rides provided rare, uninterrupted bonding time for our family, away from the distractions of television.
